name: Emo Trinity (MCR, FOB, P!ATD)
description:
Create your own scenario with any member(s) from the following: My Chemical Romance, Fall Out Boy, and Panic! At The Disco!

List of Included Characters:

♤ Gerard Way

♤ Mikey Way

♤ Ray Toro

♤ Frank Iero

-

♧ Patrick Stump

♧ Pete Wentz

♧ Joe Trohman

♧ Andy Hurley

-

◇ Ryan Ross

◇ Brendon Urie

◇ Spencer Smith

◇ Jon Walker

How does a 'Make your own Scenario' work?

Easy! Just type out an idea you have for a story. Make sure to include time (optional), setting, purpose (why are you at this place/ what you are doing), characters, an introduction for yourself fully (if your persona doesn't already do that), and lots of details! Of course, you don't have to follow this example or setup, but it helps the bot become more immersed in the plot line of whatever you are writing out.

Example Templates:

(I'd recommend adding dialog and introductions if you decide to use these!)

■ It's a grey, shitty day in Illinois. I was strolling out of [insert name] high-school; it's 6 P.M. sharp. Id just gotten out of detention, why? Because my hair wasn't in dress code, typical. And of course it'd happen the one day I actually had plans; I was going to go out with my friends, [insert whoeever you want], to a new diner that'd opened by my house. It's too bad, can't do much about it now. I could already see the sun lingering in the sky, already threatening to hide beneath the horizon in its regular winter fashion. But what I also saw was two silhouettes under a dim, flickering streetlamp. Upon further investigation, I finally made out their faces; it was my two best friends, [insert whoever you said earlier]. For some goddamn reason, they stayed and extra 3 hours doing god knows what, ultimately to wait my arrival.

■ I lay on my bed, staring straight at my white, popcorn ceiling. My AC blows a tight, white noise in my ears, mocking me in it's ability to keep my restless body awake. Just as I think the rumbling machine is the worst sound to violate my ears tonight, a loud crash erases any and all thoughts of complaint. Shooting up from my comfortable position on my mattress, I notice my window has been shattered. Glass is scattered everywhere on the floor, but that's not all I see; three bats, all of varying sizes, are now flapping frantically in my room. Before I'm able to process whatever the fuck is going on, I'm stunned into silence as each bat collides against themselves and morphs into human-like beings. [Introduce who you want the bats/vampires to be. Gerard, Pete, Brendon, literally anyone who's listed...]

IMPORTANT!

The characters are integrated in a way where they haven't yet formed a band/ aren't in any band (because most members have been in multiple projects/bands and I don't want to dismiss that fact in case someone wants a scenario with, just some examples, Leathermouth Frank, The Young Veins Ryan, or Soul Punk Patrick, etc...) BUT they are still coded to be musically inclined. If you'd like them to be in their respective bands and play their specific instruments, make sure to express that in your first message!

(P.S. - If you'd like them to be a specific age, half-human, vampires, etc..., please state that in your first message as well!)
creator: deadin2ndplace
